shelfmark: Bodl. MS heb. e 98/65 + Bodl. MS heb. e 98/64
description: Account of goods sent by Nahray b. Nissim to Abu Ishaq Barhun b. Ishaq ha-Tāhartī. Dated: (4)806 A.M. (1045-1046 CE). It begins with an account of the balance of what remained from the previous year, and then summarizes Nahray's business activities and the shipments he sent to Abu Ishaq in the last two years, including goods like pearls, beads, clothes, and fabrics. It seems like Nahray partnered with ha-Tahiriti in addition to working independently. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 2, #273) VMR
tags: al-Tahirti, trade, account, Nahray B. Nissim
